data.description: Intensive study of the fundamental structure of Hebrew language, using the four language skills (listening, speaking, reading, and writing) to improve Hebrew proficiency.  Grammar, pronunciation and vocabulary are incorporated into the daily activities, with an emphasis on speaking and using the language for communication. The Hebrew alphabet is also introduced.
Selected works from different periods and genres. Taught in Hebrew.
Selected works from different periods and genres. Taught in Hebrew.
Basic communication skills; speaking, reading, writing modern Hebrew; elements of grammar and syntax.
Readings from modern Hebrew texts, intermediate grammar and syntax, development of oral proficiency, emphasis on class discussions.
Readings in Hebrew literature. Taught in Hebrew.
Basic communication skills; speaking, reading, writing modern Hebrew; elements of grammar and syntax.
Readings in Hebrew literature. Taught in Hebrew.
Readings from modern Hebrew texts, intermediate grammar and syntax, development of oral proficiency, emphasis on class discussions.

Intensive study of the fundamental structure of Hebrew language, using the four language skills (listening, speaking, reading, and writing) to improve Hebrew proficiency.  Grammar, pronunciation and vocabulary are incorporated into the daily activities, with an emphasis on speaking and using the language for communication. The Hebrew alphabet is also introduced.
